Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Zeta Communities, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Luke Nicholas Eaton, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Cannon Constructors North, Inc.
Benjamin Boyd, Project Manager for plaintiff Cannon Constructors North, Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Zeta Communities, Inc.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on October 24, 2016.
Default as to defendant Zeta Communities, Inc. was entered on December 14, 2016.
Order Granting defendant Black Coral Capital, LLC's motion for summary judgment was filed on November 1, 2017.
Dismissal as to defendant Black Coral Capital, LLC was filed on November 3, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on November 27, 2017.

Exhibit 1: Copy of the Manufacturing and Purchase Agreement..........................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Subcontractor Master Schedule Paid and to be Paid.........................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Cannon Constructors North, Inc., a California corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Zeta Communities, Inc., a Delaware Corporation, as follows:

Damages - $1,500,000.00.

Total - $1,500,000.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
